svg.text: 5 Adapters (Shield, Leo, Puzzle, Fox, Soter) -- Delegated Proving -- Auto-decrypt

g.text: sync.ts -- Polls Explorer API for on-chain state
AES-256-GCM -- Per-column key derivation -- HMAC lookup
Rate limited -- CORS allowlist -- Helmet headers

svg.text: UTXO Record Model -- BHP256 Commitments -- Selective Disclosure

g.text: Commitment hash only -- NO token transfer
Winner claims item -- Losers reclaim escrow

svg.text: Zero-Knowledge Execution -- SnarkVM -- Proof Verification -- Block Production

g.text: Bid amounts during sealed phase (encrypted in SealedBid record)
Bidder identities (never stored on-chain, only in off-chain transition scope)
Seller address (stored as BHP256 hash -- computationally infeasible to reverse)
Winner identity (self-disclosed via prove_won_auction ZK proof only)
Bid commitment hashes (BHP256 -- cannot derive amount)
Revealed bid amounts (intentional -- required for settlement)
Auction metadata (status, deadlines, bid count -- no sensitive data)
Settlement proofs (BHP256 hash -- tamper-evident, publicly verifiable)
Reserve price hash (disclosed at finalize, after all bids revealed)
